description:
## File
src/controllers/api_base_controller.cr lines ~106-107

## Problem
When DNS resolution fails for an allowlisted domain, validate_proxy_url_with_ip returns {true, nil}, falling back to normal DNS resolution without IP pinning. An attacker-controlled DNS server could return public IP on first resolution (validation) and private IP on second (actual fetch).

## Fix
When validation returns {true, nil} (DNS failed for allowlisted domain), refuse the request rather than falling back to unpinned resolution. Or retry DNS resolution with a timeout.
title: Fix: SSRF DNS rebinding fallback gap in proxy validation
